effectDisplayName.description: The display name shown in the UI for this effect.

disabled.description: Whether this effect is entirely disabled or not.

cssVarPrefix.description: The prefix for the CSS variables that correspond to the configurable properties in this effect's JSON file.

name.description: The name of the configurable property which will be exposed to the user to configure in VSCode as well as exposed to TypeScript.

text.description: The text to display for the display name.

useMarkdown.description: Whether to use markdown formatting for displaying the property name within the VS Bloom Settings Editor.

settingsEditorDisplayName.description: The display name of the configurable property which will be shown in the VS Bloom Settings Editor. If not provided, the name property will be used as the display name (with capitalization and spaces introduced).

type.description: The data type of the configurable property.

description.description: The description of the configurable property which will be shown in the UI to the user as an explanation for the property.

markdownDescription.description: Equivalent to the description property, but allowing for markdown formatting as well.

enum.description: An array of possible values for the configurable property.

step.description: The step size for the configurable property in the VS Bloom Settings Editor. Note - this does not restrict users from inputting smaller steps.

cssUnit.description: A CSS unit string that will be appended to the CSS variable name for the configurable property when it is automatically pulled from the user's VS Code settings and forwarded into a CSS variable on the Electron Renderer's DOM :root element.

isColor.description: Whether the configurable property is a color or not. If true, the VS Bloom Settings Editor will automatically render an interactive color picker for the property.
